product: Databricks SQL alerts are now in Public Preview
tagline: Databricks SQL alerts: The latest version of Databricks SQL alerts, with a new editing experience, is now in Public Preview.
what_it_does: Databricks SQL alerts: The latest version of Databricks SQL alerts, with a new editing experience, is now in Public Preview. Databricks SQL alerts run queries on a schedule and notify you when a condition that you define is met against the query result. When you schedule an alert, its associated query runs and the condition is evaluated.
why_it_matters: Use them to track business KPIs, monitor data quality, watch cost trends, and catch operational issues across your Databricks workloads.

capabilities.title: Walk through the alert editor
capabilities.desc: Walk through the alert editor end-to-end. Includes advanced settings and notification template customization.

capabilities.title: Find alerts on the listing
capabilities.desc: Find alerts on the listing page, share them, transfer ownership, and track changes with Databricks Git folders.

key_takeaway: Databricks SQL alerts: The latest version of Databricks SQL alerts, with a new editing experience, is now in Public Preview.
